message:
fix(setup): correct allowedTools pattern from "bd:*" to "bd *"

The Claude Code allowedTools pattern uses prefix matching with space separator,
not colon. "Bash(bd *)" matches "bd ready", "bd create", etc.

Follow-up to 3d48458.
